recommendations.director: Danny Pang Phat, Oxide Pang Chun

recommendations.director: Danny Pang Phat, Oxide Pang Chun

recommendations.director: Oxide Pang Chun, Danny Pang Phat

recommendations.director: Danny Pang Phat, Oxide Pang Chun

recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.

recommendations.title: Some Like It Hot
recommendations.overview: In Prohibition-era Chicago, musicians Joe and Jerry witness a mob hit, and flee the state in an all-female band disguised as Josephine and Daphne, but further complications set in.

recommendations.title: Looper

recommendations.title: Bloodsport
recommendations.overview: An American Army Major goes AWOL to Hong Kong for an outlawed martial arts contest called the Kumite.

recommendations.title: Special ID
recommendations.overview: A career-long undercover Hong Kong cop is sent to Mainland China when his former protégé becomes the primary suspect in a murder.
